description: Dashboard maintenance radar générique — monitoring temps réel

options.content: ⚡ Fault Injector — déclenchez des scénarios de pannes à la demandeOuvrir l'injecteur →

targets.rawSql: SELECT CASE operational_state WHEN 'OPERATIONAL' THEN 1 WHEN 'DEGRADED' THEN 2 WHEN 'FAULT' THEN 3 WHEN 'MAINTENANCE' THEN 4 ELSE 0 END as value FROM radar_metrics WHERE radar_id = '${radar_id}' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT active_alarms as value FROM radar_metrics WHERE radar_id = '${radar_id}' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT uptime_hours as value FROM radar_metrics WHERE radar_id = '${radar_id}' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT CASE rotation_state WHEN 'rotating' THEN 1 WHEN 'fixed' THEN 2 WHEN 'stby' THEN 3 ELSE 0 END as value FROM radar_metrics WHERE radar_id = '${radar_id}' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT time, rpm as "RPM" FROM radar_metrics WHERE radar_id = '${radar_id}' AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time
SELECT cumul_rotations as value FROM radar_metrics WHERE radar_id = '${radar_id}' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT
  time,
  temp_cabin      AS "Cabine",
  temp_motor      AS "Moteur",
  temp_transmitter AS "Transmetteur",
  temp_external   AS "Externe"
FROM radar_metrics
WHERE radar_id = '${radar_id}' AND $__timeFilter(time)
ORDER BY time
SELECT time, humidity_internal AS "Interne", humidity_external AS "Externe" FROM radar_metrics WHERE radar_id = '${radar_id}' AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time
SELECT time, vibration_g AS "Vibration" FROM radar_metrics WHERE radar_id = '${radar_id}' AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time
SELECT temp_cabin as value FROM radar_metrics WHERE radar_id = '${radar_id}' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT temp_motor as value FROM radar_metrics WHERE radar_id = '${radar_id}' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT temp_transmitter as value FROM radar_metrics WHERE radar_id = '${radar_id}' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT
  time,
  gen1_power_w AS "Génératrice 1",
  gen2_power_w AS "Génératrice 2",
  (COALESCE(gen1_power_w,0) + COALESCE(gen2_power_w,0)) AS "Total"
FROM radar_metrics
WHERE radar_id = '${radar_id}' AND $__timeFilter(time)
ORDER BY time
SELECT time, gen1_voltage_v AS "Tension" FROM radar_metrics WHERE radar_id = '${radar_id}' AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time
SELECT time, gen1_freq_hz AS "Fréquence" FROM radar_metrics WHERE radar_id = '${radar_id}' AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time
SELECT CASE gen1_state WHEN 'running' THEN 1 WHEN 'standby' THEN 2 WHEN 'fault' THEN 3 ELSE 0 END as value FROM radar_metrics WHERE radar_id = '${radar_id}' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT CASE gen2_state WHEN 'running' THEN 1 WHEN 'standby' THEN 2 WHEN 'fault' THEN 3 ELSE 0 END as value FROM radar_metrics WHERE radar_id = '${radar_id}' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT gen1_current_a as value FROM radar_metrics WHERE radar_id = '${radar_id}' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT time, gen2_voltage_v AS "Tension" FROM radar_metrics WHERE radar_id = '${radar_id}' AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time
SELECT gen2_current_a as value FROM radar_metrics WHERE radar_id = '${radar_id}' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT time, rf_power_peak_w AS "Puissance crête", rf_power_avg_w AS "Puissance moyenne" FROM radar_metrics WHERE radar_id = '${radar_id}' AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time
SELECT time, vswr AS "VSWR" FROM radar_metrics WHERE radar_id = '${radar_id}' AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time
SELECT vswr as value FROM radar_metrics WHERE radar_id = '${radar_id}' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT
  time,
  alarm_code,
  severity,
  message,
  resolved_at
FROM radar_alarms
WHERE radar_id = '${radar_id}'
  AND $__timeFilter(time)
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 100

title: Maintenance Radar — Temps Réel
